editingRetention.title: Editing & retention
editingRetention.editWindowHint: Senders (school staff only) can edit their messages for this many minutes after sending. Set to 0 to disable editing.
editingRetention.retentionHint: Messages older than this are deleted automatically. Leave blank to keep messages forever.
editingRetention.gdprNote: GDPR note: Setting a retention period helps comply with data minimisation. The platform deletes messages permanently — for safeguarding records, export important conversations before retention runs. (Retention enforcement runs in a future worker — the setting is captured now.)

toggles.studentStudentHint: Students can message other students at this school. Off by default for safeguarding.
toggles.studentParentHint: Students can initiate conversations with parents.

disableMessaging.title: Disable messaging?
disableMessaging.body: This disables the entire inbox for everyone in your school. Users will be unable to send or read new messages. Are you sure?

enableStudents.title: Let students initiate?
enableStudents.body: This lets students initiate conversations with anyone the matrix allows. Make sure your matrix is configured appropriately before turning this on.

enableParents.title: Let parents initiate?
enableParents.body: This lets parents initiate conversations with anyone the matrix allows. Make sure your matrix is configured appropriately before turning this on.

resetDefaults.title: Reset matrix to defaults?
resetDefaults.body: This resets the 9×9 matrix to the platform defaults. Your custom configuration will be lost. Kill switches and edit/retention settings are not affected.

publicApplyForm.modePickerTitle: Are you a new family or adding a child to an existing family?
publicApplyForm.modePickerOptionNewLabel: New family applying for the first time
publicApplyForm.modePickerOptionNewDescription: Choose this if you're applying to the school for the first time. You'll be asked for your family details and each child's information.
publicApplyForm.modePickerOptionExistingLabel: Adding a child to an existing family
publicApplyForm.modePickerOptionExistingDescription: Choose this if you already have one or more children enrolled. We'll look up your family record by household number, then you can add the new child or children to your application.
publicApplyForm.lookupSubtitle: Enter the household number shown on your school account and a parent email address we already have on file. Both must match.
publicApplyForm.lookupFailedError: We couldn't find a family matching that household number and email. Please double-check both fields and try again.
publicApplyForm.lookupRateLimitError: Too many lookup attempts from your network. Please wait an hour and try again.
publicApplyForm.matchedBannerCount: You currently have {count, plural, one {# child} other {# children}} enrolled. The new child you add below will be linked to this family record.
publicApplyForm.studentsNewSubtitle: Add each child you're applying for. You can add multiple children in one application.
publicApplyForm.studentsExistingSubtitle: Add the new child or children you'd like to register. Your existing children are unchanged.
publicApplyForm.privacyNotice: By submitting this form you agree to the school's privacy policy. Your information is used only to process this application.
publicApplyForm.rateLimitError: Too many submissions from your network right now. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
publicApplyForm.schoolNotFoundBody: We couldn't find a school matching that link. Please check the QR code or the link you were sent.
publicApplyForm.formUnavailableBody: This school has not published an admission form yet. Please contact the school directly.
publicApplyForm.genericErrorBody: We couldn't load the application form. Please try again in a few minutes.
publicApplyForm.submittedTitle: Thank you — your application has been received.
publicApplyForm.submittedTitlePlural: Thank you — your applications have been received.
publicApplyForm.submittedBody: We'll email you if we need anything further. If a seat is available for your requested year group, you'll hear from us within 14 days.
publicApplyForm.submittedNextSteps: Keep these reference numbers safe — you'll need them if you contact the school about your application.
publicApplyForm.paymentSuccessFollowup: You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
publicApplyForm.paymentCancelledBody: Your application is still on hold — you can try the payment link again.
publicApplyForm.paymentCancelledFollowup: Use the link in the email we sent you to retry the payment within the hold window.

payment.upfrontPercentageHint: Percentage of the annual fee that must be paid before enrolment is confirmed.

payment.stripeOnlineHint: Parents receive a secure Stripe checkout link by email.
payment.allowCashHint: Allow the front office to record a cash payment on behalf of the parent.
payment.allowBankTransferHint: Show bank transfer instructions with an IBAN on the payment page.
payment.bankIbanHint: Displayed to parents who choose bank transfer.

rules.maxHorizonHint: How many academic years ahead parents can submit applications.

approval.title: Approval & overrides
approval.subtitle: Control who can approve applications and override payment requirements.
approval.requireApprovalHint: Applications must be manually approved by an admin before a payment link is sent.
approval.overrideRoleHint: The minimum role required to force-approve an application without payment.

stripe.title: Stripe configuration
stripe.subtitle: Manage your Stripe API keys and webhook secret for online payments.

paymentResult.successBody: Your payment has been processed successfully. Your child's application has been approved and they are now being enrolled at the school. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
paymentResult.successNextSteps: The school will be in touch with next steps, including class assignments and any remaining paperwork. If you have any questions, please contact the school administration.
paymentResult.cancelledBody: It looks like your payment wasn't completed. Don't worry — your child's seat is still reserved. You can try again using the payment link sent to your email, or contact the school to arrange an alternative payment method.
paymentResult.cancelledHelp: Your payment window is still open. If you're experiencing difficulties, please contact the school administration — they can help you complete the payment or arrange an alternative.
